conversation_topics.topic: Weeknight miso-salmon rice bowls (easy, minimal dishes)

Assistant: "Miso-glazed salmon bowls: rice + broiled salmon + quick cucumber salad. It’s like 20 minutes and one sheet pan."
User: "How do I not dry out the salmon? I always overdo it."
Assistant: "Pull it when it flakes at the edges but still looks slightly translucent in the thickest part—carryover heat finishes it."
